text: SUCH  INSURANCE  IS  REQUIRED  HEREIN  OR  NOT,  OR  ANY  LOSS  WHICH  SHOULD  HAVE BEEN COVERED BY INSURANCE REQUIRED HEREIN, INCLUDING THE DEDUCTIBLE AND/OR UNINSURED PORTION THEREOF, MAINTAINED AND/OR REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY SUBCONTRACTOR AND/OR ITS SUB-SUBCONTRACTORS PURSUANT TO THIS SUBCONTRACT.
